2238490.name: Polarize Soundtrack
2238490.description:
The original soundtrack for Polarize, composed by Daniella Garner!

Includes volumes 1 and 2* of the OST, which comprises of 32 mp3 tracks. Amongst the 32 music tracks are some that were left unused in the final game.

*Volume 2 of the soundtrack was meant to be for the unfinished v1.2 update of Polarize, which ultimately never released. All of the music included is unused.
